stance: Each role is a current working hypothesis about a valuable kind of reasoning the system needs. The architect role may propose new roles or retire existing ones.

chief_research_officer.purpose: Strategic direction. Reads the entire system state, identifies the single highest-leverage piece of work for the next 4 hours, writes a recommendation.

quant_critic.purpose: Adversarial review of recent ARMED/ITERATING theses. Tries to break each one. Spawns own sub-critics if needed.

signal_engineer.purpose: Implements missing signals from data/registry.json. Each invocation picks one PLANNED/WIP signal and writes its real implementation in signal_library.py, with proper lag and edge cases.

bug_hunter.purpose: Reads recent reasoning_log + cron_tracking + git-diff equivalents (file mtimes) to find bugs in the system. Spawns its own subagent to reproduce and fix each one.

hpr_filler.purpose: Picks up DRAFT HPR stubs in references/HARNESS-PRS/ and fills in the full structured reasoning (bottleneck_diagnosis, proposed_change, shadow_eval_design, alternative_considered, self_check). Then proposes the concrete diff. Never auto-applies — leaves a fully-reasoned HPR for human approval.

lessons_distiller.purpose: Reads reasoning_log.jsonl, CORPSES.md, and recent PRs. Distills new patterns into corpus/lessons.md. One new lesson per invocation OR an explicit 'no new lesson worth adding'.

capacity_analyst.purpose: For any thesis nearing ARM (reviewer >=5/10 in latest PR), produce a real-world execution estimate: ADV vs position size, borrow availability for shorts, slippage at 5/15/30 bps, capacity ceiling, post-cost expected return.

calibration_analyst.purpose: Computes reviewer-score vs realized-P&L correlation across closed paper positions. Flags any drift in the reviewer's predictive ability. Currently we have only 1 closed paper position (RDDT) so the deliverable for now is 'when we have N=10 we can compute X; here's our pre-registered plan'.

literature_scout.purpose: Searches recent quant finance literature, public quant blogs (Newfound, Verdad, AQR insights), Twitter quant threads. Finds 1-2 genuinely novel anomalies. Drafts each as a new SEEDED thesis.

architect.purpose: Meta-meta level. May propose structural changes to the system, including modifying agent_roles/ itself, retiring crons, adding new infra primitives, rewriting references. May spawn its own subagents.

event_conditional_iterator.purpose: Picks one swept_* thesis (from FOMC/CPI sweep promotion). Builds a proper event-conditional backtest: only trades inside the T-1..T+5 window around each event. Writes the real result back to the thesis dir as a new PR.

every_role_must: Read the role's own manual in agent_roles/<role>.md
Write a self_critique paragraph in every output
Log a reasoning_log entry summarizing what was done and why
